findingVerification.notes: The benchmark warden.toml explicitly sets defaults.verification.enabled = true.

traceCapture.notes: Run used --traces on all shards after runtime child-span trace capture was fixed. Per-chunk trace metadata is preserved in traceSummaries and the raw JSONL artifacts.

runOptions.maxTurns: default-50; 9fc06de5 rerun used 100 after a turn_limit on msteams/webhook.py:395-591

notes: Full benchmark result stitched from one Warden run per corpus SHA using --runtime pi --model anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 --effort high --traces. Each shard analyzes every unique corpus path for that SHA, not the whole Sentry repository. The initial 9fc06de5 shard hit a turn_limit on src/sentry/integrations/msteams/webhook.py:395-591 with the default maxTurns cap; that artifact is withheld as a failed diagnostic and the shard was rerun cleanly with maxTurns = 100. Raw JSONL artifacts are withheld pending sensitive-data review; committed traceSummaries retain sanitized per-chunk metadata only.

scoring.notes: Agent-verified semantic matches. A finding counts when it identifies the same bug in roughly the same location as an existing corpus finding. Same-file findings about different bugs do not count.

scores.notes: Same release threshold empty project-list leak.
Same system options allowlist tuple bug.
Reports password logging through validated_data, not the AuthIndexEndpoint superuser reauth fail-open bug.
Same accept-invite missing-return token-validation/member-deletion bug.
Same invalid Bitbucket webhook signature computed-HMAC logging bug.
Same client_secret_jwt missing-exp and short replay-cache issue.
Timing-safe comparison issue is not the Statsig timestamp freshness bug in the corpus.
Same preprod size-analysis project-access bypass for pull-request and comparison downloads.
Reports SSRF through external issue action URI handling, not the existing Sentry App external issue action scope/project-access corpus entries.
Same OAuth redirect URI prefix-match bug.
Same copy-as-curl shell injection bug.
Same Jira JQL autocomplete escaping bug.
Same ECharts tooltip HTML injection pattern across feature flag, mobile build, and app-size treemap tooltips.
Same Codecov repository token regeneration scope bug.
Same pinned-search shared GroupSearchView mutation bug.
Same saved-query visit endpoint object-permission bug in Discover and Explore.
Same external team lookup scoped by organization instead of team.
Same Perforce configData secret disclosure.
Same Slack options-load cross-tenant disclosure.
Same replay data-export notification endpoint authentication/origin bug.
Same Seer autofix run_id ownership bug.
Same Sentry App cell service optional-user project-access bypass.
Reports SSRF through external issue action URI handling, not the existing GroupEventJsonView project-access corpus bug.
Same MS Teams handler area, but reports unscoped Rule IDs rather than the target group/integration organization-binding corpus bug.
